body: Well yeah but then so does the Republican congress' complete acquiescence and obsequious covering for Trump.  We shouldn't be surprised. Mainstream GOP members in the US are entirely willing to align themselves with outright fascists if they think it will help them politically.

I'd love to see one media outlet like just come out and admit that their biased coverage of the Democratic primaries contributed to this loss.  Instead they're just going to sit around pointing fingers and pretending that they knew Clinton was a bad candidate all along.  Great job Slate, you sooo didn't shit on Sanders (when you weren't actively ignoring him) for the entire primary and you're all smart and handsome and totally respectable journalists.

Of course they do.  The truly evil subset of democrats, including some of their "useful idiots", are the most intolerant people on the face of the earth.  They project everything they are on other people.  Their leaders are demonic and hell bent on setting the world down a dark path.

Just astonishing how a terrorist can drive a truck over tons of people get out and walk away just like that. What about fingerprints?  Oh right they don't take fingerprints from refugees but all citizens have their biometrics stored in a database even their babies get fingerprinted at birth

Of course, as with most Muslims, it is do as I say not as I do, damn hypocrites. She will keep her own kind subservient and indictrinated while she breaks the rules she tries to enforce, may Allah not be merciful to her at all.
